steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: McGrattan's papers being "frequently cited" by other scholars, who "clearly find her studies valuable," both point to the same direction: her work is useful. The blank should connect frequent citation to highlighting usefulness.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
Underscores means emphasizes or highlights — exactly fitting how citation frequency emphasizes usefulness. Forestalls (prevents), belies (contradicts), and overshadows (eclipses) all run opposite to the supportive logic.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
